title: Vanilla IRL
description: Realism but keeping the vanilla feel and gameplay!
body:
![Logo](https://i.imgur.com/S36mDdf.png)

**A modpack that makes the game realistic while keeping the vanilla feel!**
#
Current Features:
- Ambient and footstep sounds.
- Realistic fighting.
- Better 3D models.
- Improved performance.
- Shader support with some shaders included.
- Overall improvements and fixes to the game.
- No Mojang telemetery or chat reports.
- World hosting to your friends that also has the modpack.
- Basic block, mob, sound, cape and visual pyhsics.
- Better particles.
- World map.
#
![Raid here from v1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8bf6d1100f7d5bb6642e48e09c530d3ec6926ac.png)
